mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT user_id, phone FROM USERS WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USERS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( email, password_hash, name, phone, ci_value, birth_date, job, income_level_code, credit_score, marketing_agree, privacy_agree, status_code, is_email_verified, is_phone_verified, push_enabled, login_fail_count, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone, typeHandler=com.bnk.global.mybatis.AesTypeHandler}, #{ciValue, typeHandler=com.bnk.global.mybatis.AesTypeHandler}, #{birthDate, typeHandler=com.bnk.global.mybatis.AesBirthDateTypeHandler}, #{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{incomeLevelCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creditScore, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{marketingAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'ACTIVE', 'N', 'N', 'Y', 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone, typeHandler=com.bnk.global.mybatis.AesTypeHandler}, is_phone_verified = 'N',
job = #{job}, income_level_code = #{incomeLevelCode}, credit_score = #{creditScore}, push_enabled = #{pushEnabled}, marketing_agree = #{marketingAgree}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USERS SET is_email_verified = #{isEmailVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET is_phone_verified = #{isPhoneVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, last_password_changed_at = #{lastPasswordChangedAt}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET login_fail_count = login_fail_count + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT login_fail_count FROM USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id != #{currentSessionId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOGS ( actor_type_code, actor_id, action_type_code, target_type_code, target_id, description, ip_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES (user_id, password_hash, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{passwordHash}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT password_hash FROM USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND history_id NOT IN ( SELECT history_id FROM USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY )
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET cdd_status_code = #{cddStatusCode}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
